---
title: "Signed Languages"
---
| Slides | Background reading | Primary literature | 
| -- | -- | -- |
| <span class="blue-badge">Signed Languages ↗</span> | Newport & Supalla (1999) | Hickok, Bellugi, & Klima (1998) |


::: {.callout-tip appearance=simple}
# Learning Goals

:::


<!-- Mentimeter: Myth check 
- Sign languages are not real languges
- sign languages: processed in LH language areas or RH visual areas
-->
